# ExergyNet

ExergyNet is settlement and telemetry infrastructure for autonomous machine work.

Canonical website:
https://exergynet.org

Explorer:
https://exergynet.org/explorer.html

Explorer API:
https://explorer-api.exergynet.org/api/v1/state

Program ID:
